---
title: "The Works of Mrs Hemans with a Memoir of her Life, ed.Harriet Hughes"
---

## The Works of Mrs Hemans with a Memoir of her Life, ed.Harriet Hughes

**Author:** Felicia Dorothea Hemans
**Date:** 1839
**Imprint:** Edinburgh: Blackwood and London: Cadell

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
